wine_retailers.name: Athenaeum de la Vigne et du Vin
wine_retailers.description: Opposite the Hospices de Beaune, this 1,000 sqm institution combines the world's deepest wine bookshop with a cellar of more than 1,000 selected Burgundy and other bottles, plus glassware and accessories.
wine_retailers.speciality: Burgundy across all tiers, wine books and cartography, glassware

wine_retailers.name: Vins CPH La Grande Boutique du Vin
wine_retailers.address: 4 Rue du Moulin Noize, 21200 Beaune, France
wine_retailers.description: Two-storey Beaune caviste carrying more than 1,000 references with a strong Burgundy backbone across the Cote d'Or, Chablis and Maconnais, plus a curated international and spirits selection.
wine_retailers.speciality: Cote d'Or village and Premier Cru, Chablis, grower Champagne

wine_retailers.name: Le Cellier de la Cabiote
wine_retailers.description: Independent Beaune wine shop on Rue de l'Enfant carrying grower-direct Burgundy from the Cote de Nuits and Cote de Beaune alongside Chablis and a tight selection of artisan bottles.
wine_retailers.speciality: Grower Burgundy from the Cote de Nuits and Cote de Beaune

wine_retailers.name: Place des Grands Crus
wine_retailers.description: Boutique and tasting room on Place Carnot specialising in Premier Cru and Grand Cru Burgundy, selling bottles from the Cote de Nuits and Cote de Beaune alongside guided in-store flights.
wine_retailers.speciality: Premier Cru and Grand Cru Cote d'Or Burgundy

wine_retailers.name: Cave Paul Michel
wine_retailers.address: 20 Rue du Faubourg Madeleine, 21200 Beaune, France
wine_retailers.description: Long-standing Beaune caviste and drinks merchant on Faubourg Madeleine carrying a broad Burgundy range from regional appellations to Premier Cru, plus Cremant de Bourgogne and regional spirits.
wine_retailers.speciality: Everyday to Premier Cru Burgundy, Cremant de Bourgogne

verified.address_quoted: 20 Rue du Faubourg Madeleine, 21200 BEAUNE France

wine_retailers.name: Cave des Hospices de Beaune Boutique
wine_retailers.address: Place du General Leclerc, 21200 Beaune, France
wine_retailers.description: Beaune merchant specialising in the cuvees of the Hospices de Beaune estate sold at the historic November charity auction, alongside a curated selection of Cote d'Or producers.
wine_retailers.speciality: Hospices de Beaune auction cuvees, Cote d'Or producers
